summary: Improve go spike task scope presets for code/docs workflow repos
description: Self-reflect follow-up: generated tasks defaulted to docs/scripts/Makefile and missed cli/tests for go-workflow-stack implementation tasks. Add CLI options or better defaults so go spike can create implementation-ready task scopes without manual patching.
acceptance: go spike can create tasks with explicit read/modify scope presets or implementation defaults

evidence.summary: Self-reflect follow-up implemented: go spike now has --task-scope code|docs; default code generates tasks with cli/go.py, tests/**, docs/** and Makefile scope, preventing manual scope repair for implementation repos. Verified pytest -q and make check.
